mapper.insert: insert into internship_evaluation_detail (evaluation_id, student_id, category_code, category_name, score, weight, create_time, update_time) values (#{evaluationId}, #{studentId}, #{categoryCode}, #{categoryName}, #{score}, #{weight}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.delete: delete from internship_evaluation_detail where evaluation_id = #{evaluationId} and category_code = #{categoryCode}
mapper.select: select ied.*, ie.id as ie_id, ie.student_id as ie_student_id, ie.total_score as ie_total_score, ie.grade as ie_grade, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id from internship_evaluation_detail ied left join internship_evaluation ie on ied.evaluation_id = ie.id left join student_users su on ied.student_id = su.id where ied.id = #{id}

select ied.*, ie.id as ie_id, ie.student_id as ie_student_id, ie.total_score as ie_total_score, ie.grade as ie_grade, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id from internship_evaluation_detail ied left join internship_evaluation ie on ied.evaluation_id = ie.id left join student_users su on ied.student_id = su.id where ied.evaluation_id = #{evaluationId} order by ied.id

select ied.*, ie.id as ie_id, ie.student_id as ie_student_id, ie.total_score as ie_total_score, ie.grade as ie_grade, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id from internship_evaluation_detail ied left join internship_evaluation ie on ied.evaluation_id = ie.id left join student_users su on ied.student_id = su.id where ied.student_id = #{studentId} order by ied.id
mapper.insert:
insert into internship_evaluation_detail (evaluation_id, student_id, category_code, category_name, score, weight, create_time, update_time) values
(#{detail.evaluationId}, #{detail.studentId}, #{detail.categoryCode}, #{detail.categoryName}, #{detail.score}, #{detail.weight}, #{detail.createTime}, #{detail.updateTime})
